name: agroenlace-mvp
description: AgroEnlace MVP TRL5 — Marketplace agrícola Cundinamarca

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && cd backend && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
